A unified operating system for restaurants

Dining,
re-imagined
with AI.

One platform. Four portals. From the moment a guest scans a QR to the second a kitchen ticket clears — SmartDine connects every step with an AI sommelier-waiter at its heart.

Start as a guest Staff login

Four portals, one heartbeat.

Customer Portal

Order, talk to the AI waiter, track your token in realtime.

Restaurant Portal

Dashboard, revenue, inventory, menu and customer analytics.

Kitchen Portal

Live order queue, timers, one-tap status updates.

Counter Portal

Big-screen token board for guests picking up orders.
